channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Marshall Heston 60 : cette barre de son 5.1 au look rétro, compatible Dolby Atmos et DTS:X, perd 150 €
item.description: Compacte, puissante et stylée, la Marshall Heston 60 est une barre de son qui aligne les atouts. En voici un autre : son prix, qui passe de 599,99 euros à 449 euros chez Rakuten (vendeur Boulanger).

item.title: Fujifilm’s X Half is even more whimsical with a $300 price cut
item.description: Fujifilm’s X Half digital camera wasn’t designed to replace your main camera, though you’d be forgiven for assuming it was with its ludicrous $850 price. However, the company recently reduced the MSRP to $649.99, and is now knocking an additional $100 off through June 28th. That means you can grab the X Half in its […]

item.title: ElliQ is a surprisingly helpful companion robot for older adults
item.description: A week before the ElliQ robot arrived, a neurologist told me we need to rebalance my mom's life. Her Parkinson's disease medication had steadily become less effective over the previous month, and with it, she had slowly stopped doing many of the things crucial to managing the disease - exercising, socializing, and engaging in hobbies. […]

item.title: ‘The clicky keys are sumptuous’ — Corsair’s top-tier gaming keyboard certainly feels great, but I’m not sure it does enough to justify its high price
item.description: The Corsair Vanguard Air 99 Wireless is a top-end gaming keyboard with a great build and satisfying switches — but is it deserving of that steep price tag?

item.title: What is the release date for The Testaments episode 9 on Hulu and Disney+?
item.description: With two episodes left to go, we're entering the quiet before the storm. But when does The Testaments episode 9 drop on Hulu and Disney+?

item.title: I tried bird photography with Sony’s longest super-telephoto zoom lens and the new A7R VI — and after seeing my pin-sharp shots of rare and beautiful birds, I’m obsessed
item.description: I took the Sony A7R VI and 400-800mm F6.3-8 super-telephoto zoom lens to my local nature reserve to try out bird photography.

item.title: Xbox change de nom
item.description: Xbox s'écrit désormais XBOX, en majuscules. Microsoft acte un rebranding typographique tranché à coups de sondage sur X, et déjà visible sur le compte officiel de la marque.

item.title: J’ai passé 3 mois avec le Huawei Pura 80 Pro : c’était Pura-ment frustrant
item.description: Le Huawei Pura 80 Pro est l'un des meilleurs photophones de 2026 à 899 euros. Mais sans Google, sans 5G et sans Netflix en HD, l'expérience demande des sacrifices.

item.title: Chatbots at the drive-thru are just the beginning
item.description: This is The Stepback, a weekly newsletter breaking down one essential story from the tech world. For more news about how AI is seeping into our daily lives, follow Emma Roth. The Stepback arrives in our subscribers' inboxes at 8AM ET. Opt in for The Stepback here. How it started In 2021, McDonald's became one […]

item.title: How to watch Sinner vs Ruud: FREE Live Streams & TV Channels for Italian Open 2026 final tennis
item.description: Watch free streams from the Italian Open 2026 final as Jannik Sinner goes for history, against Casper Ruud – tennis TV channels, broadcasters and streams.

item.title: Test du MSI Raider 16 Max HX : petit prince de la puissance
item.description: MSI a décidé de créer « le PC portable le plus puissant du marché » avec le Raider 16 Max HX. Mission réussie ? Voici notre test complet.

item.title: À quoi sert vraiment le Remote Meter que Tesla vient de lancer ?
item.description: Tesla glisse dans sa boutique américaine un nouvel accessoire à 210 dollars : un compteur communicant qui empêche le Wall Connector de faire sauter les plombs quand la maison tire déjà beaucoup d'énergie.

item.title: Save $300 on the strong and sleek Asus V16 Gaming Laptop with an RTX 5060 and 32GB of RAM
item.description: High power without the high price
